creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, 

Sorry but this is not a problem but a support question, please deffer 
to questions@FreeBSD.org (http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-questions) 
and get back to me if people are still thinking this is worth a problem. 

Thanks for taking the time to report this though!
